subject: LU-4533 lprocfs: Increase OBD_HIST_MAX to OSC_MAX_RIF_MAX

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

I am re-upping this patch since we never saw the dynamic obd_histogram allocation that was the reason we abandoned this change originally.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

The potential problem here is that this struct is used by the per-CPU stats, which are already very large, and will be 4x as large everywhere just for this one use case. 

I believe I discussed this issue with Patrick Farrell previously and sent him a prototype patch for dynamically allocating this struct, but it is not trivial. You might consider to have a simpler version that only allocated the struct at startup time based on a size passed by the caller?

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Removed the following votes:

* Code-Review-1 by HPDD Checkpatch (377)
Abandoned

parents.subject: LU-11026 lustre-dkms should require patch or quilt

commit.subject: LU-4533 lprocfs: Increase OBD_HIST_MAX to OSC_MAX_RIF_MAX
commit.message:
LU-4533 lprocfs: Increase OBD_HIST_MAX to OSC_MAX_RIF_MAX

Set OBD_HIST_MAX to 256 to match OSC_MAX_RIF_MAX so that the rpcs in
flight histogram which is diplayed by reading the rpc_stats proc
interface is correct.

Change-Id: Ic463ea8f0c16db1de4e58919badd8530ab3499c9
Cray-bug-id: LUS-554
Signed-off-by: Ryan Haasken <haasken@cray.com>
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <hornc@cray.com>
